prompt: Write a TDD for a new Inventory System. We need to support stackable items, equipment slots, weight limits, and drag-and-drop UI. The system should integrate with our existing SaveSystem and EventBus. We're considering ECS vs traditional OOP approach.
assertions: Output is saved to a Documents/TDDs/ path with TDD_ prefix and .md extension
Document contains all 8 TDD sections: Problem, Goals, Non-Goals, Design, Alternatives Considered, Dependencies, Risks, Open Questions
Design section includes a Components table with columns for Component, Responsibility, and File
Design section includes a Mermaid data flow diagram
Alternatives Considered table has at least 2 rows comparing different approaches
Dependencies section references SaveSystem and EventBus with evidence
Risks table includes likelihood and impact ratings
The skill loaded the tdd-template.md reference
